RemediationStrings.Title: UseEnhancedPin (Administrative Templates - BitLocker Drive Encryption)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\FVE\UseEnhancedPin must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - BitLocker Drive Encryption.

RemediationStrings.Title: RDVDenyCrossOrg (Administrative Templates - BitLocker Drive Encryption)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\FVE\RDVDenyCrossOrg must be 0. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - BitLocker Drive Encryption.

RemediationStrings.Title: DisableExternalDMAUnderLock (Administrative Templates - BitLocker Drive Encryption)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\FVE\DisableExternalDMAUnderLock must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - BitLocker Drive Encryption.

RemediationStrings.Title: RDVDenyWriteAccess (Administrative Templates - BitLocker Drive Encryption)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Policies\Microsoft\FVE\RDVDenyWriteAccess must be 1. Severity: High. Category: Administrative Templates - BitLocker Drive Encryption.
